name: Esker SA
summary: Esker SA provides document processing automation solutions in France and internationally. It offers financial and customer service departments digitally transform their order-to-cash and procure-to-pay cycles. The company provides document automation technologies, including Esker on Demand, a cloud-based document process and information exchange service that enables companies to automate business documents; Esker Fax/VSI-Fax, which integrates fax with enterprise applications and messaging platforms; and FlyDoc for the delivery of fax and mail on demand. The company also offers host access products to support the host access needs; and business process outsourcing solution that handles order and invoice data processing and validation. In addition, it provides maintenance and related services, such as training and installation assistance; and outsourcing of fax and mail services; and fax boards. The company serves the life sciences, manufacturing, food and beverage, electronics, and chemical industries. Esker SA was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Lyon, France.
